citation: Thall PF, Vail SC (1990). Some covariance models for longitudinal count data with overdispersion. Biometrics 46, 657-671; distributed in Venables WN, Ripley BD, MASS.
erratum: MASS 7.3-65 corrected y in row 31 (subject 8, period 3) from 21 to 23; the R reference requires MASS >= 7.3-65 to match this mirror.
